stories.title: Knicks 105-95 Spurs — Brunson's Clutch 30 Lifts New York in Game 1
stories.angle: Brunson scored 13 of his 30 points in the fourth quarter as the Knicks erased a 14-point deficit for their 12th straight playoff win

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
DOWN 14. DIDN'T MATTER.

Brunson: 30 PTS (13 in the 4th quarter)
KAT: 18 PTS / 12 REB
Hart: 15 REB / 6 AST / 4 STL

Knicks 105, Spurs 95.

12 straight. Series lead in San Antonio.

Game 2 Friday. 8:30 PM ET. ABC. #HoopHeroes #NBAFinals #KnicksTape

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Knicks trailed by 14 points in the 3rd quarter of Game 1.

Then Brunson scored 13 of his 30 in the fourth.

Then they closed on a 12-0 run.

Final: Knicks 105, Spurs 95.

12-game win streak. 1-0 in the Finals. #HoopHeroes #NBAFinals

article.headline: Down 14, Then Dominant: Brunson's Clutch 30 Gives Knicks Game 1 on the Road

research.facts:
Knicks 105-95 Spurs — Game 1 Recap
- **Sources:** ESPN game recap, NBA.com recap, CBS Sports Game 1 live updates, Yahoo Sports, NBC Sports
- **Key facts:**
- Final score: Knicks 105, Spurs 95 (June 3, 2026, Frost Bank Center, San Antonio)
- Jalen Brunson: 30 points, 13 of those in the 4th quarter [HIGH - multiple sources]
- Karl-Anthony Towns: 18 points, 12 rebounds [HIGH - multiple sources]
- Josh Hart: 3 points, 15 rebounds, 6 assists, 4 steals, 1 block in 27 minutes [HIGH - multiple sources]
- Victor Wembanyama: 26 points, 12 rebounds, 3 blocks, 6-of-21 FG, 2-of-9 3P [HIGH - multiple sources]
- Knicks trailed by 14 points in the 3rd quarter before mounting comeback [HIGH - multiple sources]
- Knicks win extended playoff win streak to 12 games [HIGH - NBA.com]
- 12-game streak: 2nd longest single-season in NBA history, tied with 1999 Spurs' streak [HIGH - NBA.com]
- Longest: 2017 Warriors' 15-game streak [HIGH - NBA.com]
- Brunson hit a corner three-pointer with 2 minutes left to give Knicks the lead for good [HIGH - CBS Sports]
- Knicks closed game on a 12-0 run [HIGH - Yahoo Sports]
- Series: Knicks lead 1-0; Game 2 Friday June 5, 8:30 PM ET, ABC, Frost Bank Center
- **Story History:** FOLLOW UP (Game 1 preview was covered June 3 as Tier 1 lead story)
- **Freshness:** Game happened June 3 — this is the day-after recap

stories.title: Josh Hart's Historic Finals Night — 15 Reb, 6 Ast, 4 Stl With 3 Points
stories.angle: Hart becomes only the 2nd player in NBA Finals history to post 15+ rebounds, 5+ assists, and 4+ steals in a single game — Larry Bird 1986 was the other

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Josh Hart in NBA Finals Game 1:

3 PTS. 15 REB. 6 AST. 4 STL.

Only the 2nd player in Finals history with those numbers.

The other? Larry Bird. 1986.

Hart doesn't need to score to win games. #HoopHeroes #NBAFinals #KnicksTape

article.headline: Larry Bird in 1986. Josh Hart in 2026. That's the Company He Keeps.

stories.title: Wembanyama's 4th Quarter Collapse — 6-of-21, Gassed, and a Limp Scare
stories.angle: Wemby shot 6-21 (2-9 from three), dribbled off his foot in final minute, and limped off court — MRI cleared him but Game 2 fitness a question

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Wembanyama in Game 1:

6-of-21 from the floor.
2-of-9 from three.
A travel. A turnover off his own foot.
A limp off the court in the 3rd.

MRI cleared him. But the Knicks found something.

Game 2 Friday. 8:30 PM ET. ABC. #HoopHeroes #NBAFinals #Spurs

research.facts:
Wembanyama's 4th Quarter Collapse
- **Sources:** Yahoo Sports, CBS Sports, NBC Sports, SI.com, ClutchPoints
- **Key facts:**
- Wemby: 6-of-21 FG (28.6%), 2-of-9 from three in Game 1 [HIGH - multiple sources]
- Final 6 minutes: 1-for-5, travel, dribbled ball off his foot [HIGH - Yahoo Sports, NBC Sports]
- Knicks ended game on 12-0 run [HIGH - multiple sources]
- Wemby limped toward bench in 3rd quarter after tangling with Josh Hart [HIGH - multiple sources]
- MRI showed no ligament damage in hyperextended knee [HIGH - NBA.com]
- Waved off medical help on bench; returned without limp with 1:22 remaining [HIGH - multiple sources]
- Spurs asked Wemby to cover enormous defensive space all game — appeared to drain him [MEDIUM - Yahoo Sports analysis]
- Played approximately 40 minutes in Game 1 [MEDIUM - inferred from game context]
- **Story History:** FOLLOW UP (Wemby's defensive dilemma covered June 3 as Tier 2; this is the Game 1 performance analysis)
- **Freshness:** Game happened June 3

stories.title: Game 2 Preview — Spurs Must Answer or Fall Into 0-2 Hole Friday
stories.angle: San Antonio must fix Wemby's shooting, avoid fourth-quarter fatigue, and counter Brunson's late-game dominance; Game 2 Friday 8:30 PM ET ABC at Frost Bank Center

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
GAME 2. FRIDAY. FROST BANK CENTER.

The Spurs are 0-2 all-time in this Finals when they fall behind 2-0.

Wemby needs a bounce-back. Vassell and Champagnie need to hit shots.

Brunson needs to be stopped.

Good luck. 8:30 PM ET. ABC. #HoopHeroes #NBAFinals #Spurs

article.headline: Game 2 Friday: What the Spurs Must Fix Before Brunson and the Knicks Put This Away

stories.title: Giannis Trade Buzz Heats Up — Heat and Blazers Already Circling
stories.angle: Bucks "open for business" on Giannis per Shams; Miami can offer Herro + Ware + picks; market expected to resolve around June 23 draft

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
SHAMS: The Bucks are "open for business" on Giannis.

Heat are pursuing him. Trail Blazers are pursuing him.

The biggest offseason story is already starting — while the Finals are still playing.

Decision expected around June 23. #HoopHeroes #NBA #Giannis

research.facts:
Giannis Trade Buzz
- **Sources:** Yahoo Sports, NBC Sports, ESPN, Pro Football Network, Wise Sports Heroics
- **Key facts:**
- Shams Charania reported Bucks "open for business on trade calls and offers" for Giannis [HIGH - multiple sources citing same report]
- Miami Heat and Portland Trail Blazers described as teams "already in pursuit" [HIGH - multiple sources]
- Miami can offer Tyler Herro, Kel'el Ware, and multiple first-round picks [MEDIUM - ESPN analysis]
- Portland's chances described as "unlikely" given Giannis preference for Eastern Conference [HIGH - NBC Sports citing league sources]
- Market expected to resolve around June 23 NBA Draft [MEDIUM - Yahoo Sports]
- Cavaliers also speculated but Cleveland's brass "vehemently" against trading Evan Mobley [HIGH - Yahoo Sports]
- Market described as "tepid so far" by insiders [MEDIUM - Yahoo Sports]
- **Story History:** NEW STORY
- **Freshness:** Ongoing offseason rumor — actively developing
